rationale: The pair is unlikely to be an obvious incidental mention: both notes focus on experienced managers making consumer-oriented judgments where customer-focused cognition increases bias (citing: customer imagery/optimism in screening; cited: empathy-driven egocentric preference predictions). The cited paper also offers a mechanism and mitigation (consumer-identity activation/suppression) that is plausibly relevant to the citing paper’s mechanism and debiasing tests, and the DOI-level match confirms a direct reference.
